chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1775 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 15589/16 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on M.A 15590/16 4. For Katcha Peshi. 01.11.2016. Mr. Basheer Ahmed Almani, Advocate for petitioner. -.-.-. 1. Granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. True translation of the annexure to be filed on or before the next date of hearing. 4. It is, inter alia, contended by the Counsel for petitioner that petitioner has obtained some loan from respondent No.5 but has paid back a substantial amount but still respondent No.5 is causing harassment to the petitioner. Issue notices to the private respondents through all modes except publication as well as notice to official respondents and A.A.G for a date to be fixed by the office after two weeks. In the meantime, respondents shall not cause harassment to the petitioner and on next date, concerned SHO P.S A-Section Dadu will ensure that Raees Juman Khan s/o Raees Muhammad Bux is present in Court. Official respondents are directed to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and if petitioner approaches them for protection, the same should be provided to him in accordance with law. JUDGE Ali Haider
